title: Dials Decide the Battle
description: Wyper and the Shandia push harder against Enel’s forces while the Straw Hats struggle to navigate the battlefield.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene centers on Enel, Eneru, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall. Wyper and the Shandia push harder against Enel’s forces while the Straw Hats struggle to navigate the battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: Yeah. It'll start revealing itself soon...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: And so? Hey, you! Take a guess.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Just use your instinct. Your instinct.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Exactly five will still be standing.

summary: Wyper and the Shandia push harder against Enel’s forces while the Straw Hats struggle to navigate the battlefield.
